title: BigBasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Full Stack Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
